title: Business Card Exchange (Meishi Koukan)
learningGoal: The learner will verbally introduce themselves in a formal context, stating their name, nationality, and occupation.
instructions: In this activity, you are attending a networking event in Tokyo. You will exchange business cards (Meishi) with a Japanese person. Follow the prompts to introduce yourself properly. Speak clearly and use a formal, polite tone.

contentItems.text: Remember the standard structure for a Japanese self-introduction: 1. Hajimemashite, 2. Name + desu, 3. Nationality + desu, 4. Occupation + desu, 5. Yoroshiku onegaishimasu.

speakingPrompt: Introduce yourself verbally as if you are handing over your business card to a new acquaintance.
scenario: You are at a formal meet-and-greet event. A Japanese office worker approaches you, bows, and introduces himself as Tanaka. Now it is your turn to introduce yourself.
role: An American university student named Alex (or you can use your real name/occupation).

subTasks.prompt: Start your introduction properly by saying 'Nice to meet you (for the first time)'.
State your name (Use 'Alex' for this exercise) using 'I am...'.

sampleResponse.targetText: わたしは アレックスです。

subTasks.prompt: State that you are a university student.
Finish your introduction politely with 'Please treat me well'.

sampleResponse.targetText: よろしく おねがいします。

scenarioContext.targetText: はじめまして。わたしは たなかです。にほんじんです。かいしゃいんです。よろしく おねがいします。
scenarioContext.transliteration: Hajimemashite. Watashi wa Tanaka desu. Nihon-jin desu. Kaishain desu. Yoroshiku onegaishimasu.
scenarioContext.baseTranslation: Nice to meet you. I am Tanaka. I am Japanese. I am an office worker. Please treat me well.

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: わたしは アレックスです。
よろしく おねがいします。

expectedSpeakingPoints: State Nationality correctly with jin and desu
requiredKeywords: よろしく おねがいします
acceptableParaphrases: The learner can use their real name, real nationality, and real occupation instead of the prompt's examples. The evaluation will accept any valid [word] desu patterns.

criteria.name: Completeness
criteria.description: Did the learner include all 5 steps of the standard introduction?

criteria.name: Fluency
criteria.description: Was the speech relatively smooth and confident?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: はじめまして。わたしは アレックスです。アメリカじんです。だいがくせいです。よろしく おねがいします。

feedbackRules.onPass: Great job! You delivered a very natural, polite Japanese self-introduction.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please try again. Ensure you include both 'Hajimemashite' at the start and 'Yoroshiku onegaishimasu' at the end.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Make sure you clearly pronounce 'desu' at the end of your name, nationality, and occupation.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: はじめまして。わたしは たなかです。にほんじんです。かいしゃいんです。よろしく おねがいします。

hintText: If you struggle with the long closing phrase, break it down: yoro-shiku o-negai-shimasu.
commonMistakes: Saying 'Watashi wa [Name]' and forgetting to add 'desu'.
Mumbling 'Yoroshiku onegaishimasu' because it is long.
